prompt: Create a cinematic fine-art portrait titled The Lady of Red Poppies: a pale-skinned woman in strict side profile facing right, cropped from chest to top of head, with her face intentionally hidden by a centered opaque square overlay in a muted red-to-gray vertical gradient. She has a short smooth bob of silver-white hair with wispy strands and heavy side-swept bangs, styled like a sculptural wig. Her head is crowned with exactly 8 red poppy elements: 1 large open poppy centered on the left front of the hair, 1 tall open poppy rising above the crown, 1 small curled bud on a thin stem at the far upper left, 1 small bud on the lower left side, 1 blurred red poppy in the background above the head, 1 open poppy partly visible on the upper right, 1 large cropped poppy at the right edge, and 1 lower-right red poppy petal cluster. The poppies have delicate translucent crinkled petals, dark centers, and thin dark curved stems emerging from the hair. Dress her in a minimalist high-collared black coat or turtleneck with soft matte fabric, giving a somber fashion-editorial silhouette. Use a shallow depth of field with the hair and foremost poppy sharply detailed while the distant flowers and background are blurred. Set the scene outdoors in a misty gray atmosphere with a soft horizon and a low field of defocused red poppies near the bottom. Lighting is overcast, cool, and diffused, with muted tones except for saturated crimson flowers; composition vertical 3:4, subject slightly left of center, elegant surreal botanical portrait, photorealistic, high detail, painterly bokeh, melancholic and refined.
